tragicHero.name: Lionel Messi
tragicHero.story:
Ugly scenes as Argentina lose World Cup final – video

There were ugly scenes at the end of the World Cup final as Argentina’s Leandro Paredes and Nahuel Molina were seen throwing punches at Spain players after their 1-0 defeat.
